narrative: U.S. equities surged to fresh record closes as investors repriced geopolitical risk lower after Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was “completely open,” sending oil sharply lower and easing inflation angst. The risk-on bid was reinforced by a strong start to earnings (notably banks) and continued leadership from big tech/AI, with the Nasdaq extending a rare multi-week winning streak.

value_picks.name: Lucid Group, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading near 52-week low amid EV market challenges and production ramp-up issues, but with strong balance sheet from Saudi backing.
value_picks.bull_case: Saudi PIF investment provides capital for Gravity SUV launch and production scaling, positioning for EV recovery as demand rebounds.

value_picks.name: Verizon Communications Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Near 52-week lows after sector rotation from defensives, despite strong Q1 results and raised guidance.
value_picks.bull_case: Robust FCF supports dividends and buybacks; 5G and fiber expansion to drive wireless subscriber growth.

value_picks.name: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Financial services stock at low multiple despite Zacks #1 ranking and improving credit metrics.
value_picks.bull_case: Strong consumer spending and risk management to boost credit sales; focus on share buybacks enhances shareholder value.

value_picks.name: Maximus Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Government services provider undervalued after divestitures, with raised FY26 guidance.
value_picks.bull_case: Resilient federal contracts and margin expansion from productivity gains position for earnings growth.

value_picks.name: DNOW Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Energy services stock below fair value per analyst estimates amid cyclical trough.
value_picks.bull_case: Oil price recovery and drilling activity rebound to lift revenues and margins.

momentum_picks.name: Hims & Hers Health Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Telehealth leader expanding GLP-1 weight loss and new testosterone offerings amid surging demand.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High growth potential in personalized medicine but faces competition in crowded telehealth space.

momentum_picks.name: Affirm Holdings Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: BNPL fintech riding consumer spending wave and partnership expansions.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Strong momentum in digital payments but sensitive to interest rate changes.

momentum_picks.name: Robinhood Markets Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Retail trading surge with crypto rally and new product launches.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Retail enthusiasm drives upside but regulatory risks loom.

momentum_picks.name: Oracle Corp.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Cloud AI infrastructure demand accelerates revenue growth.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Enterprise software moat provides stability amid AI boom.

momentum_picks.name: MaxLinear Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Semiconductor breakout on AI and connectivity chip demand.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Explosive growth in tech sector but volatile chip cycle.

watchlist_updates.detail: JPMorgan Chase reported Q1 2026 net income of $16.5B, beating expectations with strong trading revenue and dealmaking.
Oracle was among top performers in the week ending April 17 2026 with 26.77% gain amid tech sector rally.
Hims & Hers Health topped US stock gainers with 48.37% weekly rise.
Chevron Q1 earnings beat estimates by 53.26%.
